title: Requirement Trace Fields
description: Reference schema for the canonical labels used inside a requirement Trace block.

Satisfied By.description: Architecture or design artifact IDs that satisfy this requirement.

Implemented By.description: Work-item artifact IDs that implement this requirement.

Verified By.description: Verification artifact IDs that verify this requirement.

Test Refs.description: Implementation-specific string references to tests that exist because of this requirement or verify it directly.

Code Refs.description: Implementation-specific string references to code symbols, source locations, or code metadata tied to this requirement.

Related.description: Requirement IDs or artifact IDs materially related to this requirement.
